classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: Blood-soaked gladiators in dented armor, acrobatic duelists with darting swords, or far-eyed elven archers who carve their legends with steel and grit.

class_features.name: Hauler
class_features.description: Add your Constitution modifier, if positive, to your gear slots.

class_features.name: Weapon Mastery
class_features.description: Choose one type of weapon. You gain +1 to attack and damage with that weapon type. In addition, add half your level to these rolls (round down).

class_features.name: Grit
class_features.description: Choose Strength or Dexterity. You have advantage on checks of that type to overcome an opposing force.

talents_table.effect: Gain Weapon Mastery with one additional weapon type
+1 to melee and ranged attacks
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution stat
Choose one kind of armor. You get +1 AC from that armor
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Priest
classes.description: Crusading templars, prophetic shamans, or mad-eyed zealots who wield the power of their gods to cleanse the unholy.

fixed: Choice of Celestial, Diabolic, or Primordial

class_features.name: Turn Undead
class_features.description: You know the turn undead spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Deity
class_features.description: Choose a god to serve who matches your alignment. You have a holy symbol for your god (takes up no gear slots).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast priest spells you know. You know two tier 1 spells at level 1. Use Wisdom for spellcasting checks.

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
+1 to melee or ranged attacks
+1 to priest spellcasting checks
+2 to Strength or Wisdom stat
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Thief
classes.description: Rooftop assassins, grinning con artists, or cloaked cat burglars who can pluck a gem from the claws of a sleeping demon.

class_features.name: Backstab
class_features.description: Deal an extra weapon die of damage against unaware targets. Add additional dice equal to half your level (round down).

class_features.name: Thievery
class_features.description: You have the necessary tools (0 slots). You have advantage on checks for: Climbing, Sneaking/Hiding, Disguises, Traps, and Delicate tasks (picking pockets/locks).

talents_table.effect: Gain advantage on initiative rolls (reroll if duplicate)
Your Backstab deals +1 dice of damage
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Charisma stat
+1 to melee and ranged attacks
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: Rune-tattooed adepts, bespectacled magi, and flame-conjuring witches who dare to manipulate the fell forces of magic.

class_features.name: Learning Spells
class_features.description: Study a spell scroll for a day and pass a DC 15 INT check to learn it permanently. These do not count toward your known spells limit.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know. You start with three tier 1 spells. Use Intelligence for spellcasting checks.

talents_table.effect: Make 1 random magic item of a type you choose
+2 to Intelligence stat or +1 to wizard spellcasting checks
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Learn one additional wizard spell of any tier you know
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: Bards are welcome wanderers and wise advisors; it is their task to protect and share knowledge handed down through the ages.

class_features.name: Bardic Arts
class_features.description: You're trained in oration, performing arts, lore, and diplomacy. You have advantage on related checks.

class_features.name: Magical Dabbler
class_features.description: You can activate spell scrolls and wands using Charisma as your spellcasting stat. If you critically fail, roll a wizard mishap.

class_features.name: Presence
class_features.description: Make a DC 12 CHA check to enact one effect. Inspire: One target in near range gains a luck token. Fascinate (focus): You transfix all chosen targets of level 4 or less within near range.

class_features.name: Prolific
class_features.description: Add 1d6 to your learning rolls. Groups carousing with 1 or more bards add 1d6 to their rolls.

talents_table.effect: You find a random priest or wizard wand (you choose)
+1 to melee and ranged attacks or +1 to Magical Dabbler rolls
+2 points to distribute to any stats
Your Presence effects become DC 9 to enact (reroll if duplicate)
Choose a talent

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: Skilled trackers, stealthy wanderers, and peerless warriors who call the wilds their home.

class_features.name: Wayfinder
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks associated with: Navigation, Tracking, Bushcraft, Stealth, and Wild animals.

class_features.name: Herbalism
class_features.description: Make an INT check to prepare an herbal remedy. Remedies: Salve (DC 11, heals 1 HP), Stimulant (DC 12, can't be surprised 10 rounds), Foebane (DC 13, advantage on attacks vs one creature type 1d6 rounds), Restorative (DC 14, ends one poison/disease), Curative (DC 15, equivalent to Potion of Healing).

talents_table.effect: You deal d12 damage with one weapon type you choose
+1 to melee or ranged attacks and damage
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Intelligence stat
You gain advantage on Herbalism checks for a remedy you choose
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Cursedblade
classes.description: A cursing spellcaster who gains mystical energy from a powerful being and wields it through a weapon.

class_features.name: Magic Weapon
class_features.description: DC 11 CHA check. The weapon becomes magical with +1 to attack and damage for 3 rounds. No rest needed on failure.

class_features.name: Eldritch Blast
class_features.description: DC 11 CHA check. 1d4 damage within far range. No rest needed on failure.

class_features.name: Patron Boon
class_features.description: Choose a patron. Gain a new Patron Boon at even levels: 1. Read all written languages, 2. Summon Skeleton/Ghoul 1hr/day, 3. Read surface thoughts (near), 4. Apply disadvantage to target's next d20 (far), 5. Detect magic (near), 6. Don't need to breathe air.

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to spellcasting checks
+1 to melee attacks with weapons
+1 to melee damage rolls with weapons
Choose a talent

classes.name: Elemental Warrior
classes.description: A martial artist who has mastered controlling their internal energy to release it as devastating elemental blows and blasts.

class_features.name: Elemental Expert
class_features.description: Advantage on knowledge checks related to fire, electricity, water, earth, air and spirits.

class_features.name: Unarmored
class_features.description: Use Dexterity or Constitution when calculating AC.

class_features.name: Elemental Blow
class_features.description: Unarmed strikes do 1d6 damage. Choose damage type: normal, fire, electrical, cold, or acid.

class_features.name: Elemental Blast
class_features.description: DC 11 CON check. 1d4 damage (far) at levels 1-5, 1d6 at levels 6-10. Fire, electricity, cold, or acid.

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to unarmed strike attack rolls
+1 to unarmed strike damage rolls
Gain advantage on spellcasting checks (reroll if duplicated)
Choose a talent

classes.name: Monster Slayer
classes.description: A seeker of Vampires, Dragons, fiends, fey and evil monsters of the dark.

class_features.name: Monster Expert
class_features.description: You know immunities of chaotic monsters within near range. Advantage on monster knowledge checks.

class_features.name: Stalker
class_features.description: Advantage on checks to sense creatures, sneak, and hide.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: WIS-based. Spells: Protection from Evil (LV1+, DC11), Zone of Truth (LV3+, DC12), Magic Circle (LV5+, DC13), Flame Strike (LV7+, DC14), Hold Monster (LV9+, DC15).

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to spellcasting checks
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls
Choose a talent

classes.name: Mystical Archer
classes.description: An expert warrior in channeling magic into arrows fired from a bow.

class_features.name: Detecting Magic
class_features.description: Cast Detect Magic with DC 11 check using INT, WIS, or CHA.

class_features.name: Mystical Knowledge
class_features.description: Advantage on magic knowledge checks.

class_features.name: Magical Shot
class_features.description: Imbue arrow with one effect per round: Sharp (+1 damage), Accurate (+1 attack), Seeker (ignore cover), Elemental (fire/electrical/cold/acid), Returning (arrow returns), Paralysing (paralyze 1 round).

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to ranged attack rolls
+1 to ranged damage rolls
+1 to initiative rolls
Choose a talent

classes.name: Psychic Infiltrator
classes.description: A spy who strikes the psyche, infiltrates the mind and body with psionic power.

class_features.name: Psychic Blade
class_features.description: DC 12 CON/WIS check. Invisible blade does 1d6 damage with +1 to attack and damage for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Shadow Veil
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to hiding and sneaking.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: CON/WIS-based. Spells: Charm Person (LV1+, DC11), Detect Thoughts (LV3+, DC12), Alter Self (LV5+, DC12), Arcane Eye (LV7+, DC14), Teleport (LV9+, DC15).

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to spellcasting checks
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls
Choose a talent

classes.name: Samurai
classes.description: A military soldier, trained in swordsmanship, archery, and other martial arts with a special code of conduct.

class_features.name: Bushido Code
class_features.description: Immune to fear effects.

class_features.name: Aesthetic
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to literature and art. Advanced calligraphy.

class_features.name: Samurai Style
class_features.description: Select one style at level 1, new style at every even level. Styles: Kenjutsu (+1 attack/damage with sword + half level), Jujutsu (unarmed grapple/throw), Sojutsu (+1 attack/damage with spear + prone), Kyujutsu (+1 attack/damage with bow + ignore cover), Aikiken (+1 AC with sword parry), Bojutsu (+1 attack/damage with staff + push/trip), Iaijutsu (+1 initiative).

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats
+1 to melee attack rolls
+1 to ranged attack rolls
+1 to melee damage rolls
Choose a talent

classes.name: Shadow Stalker
classes.description: An experienced hunter that uses the darkness, detecting and hunting creatures.

class_features.name: Ambusher
class_features.description: You have advantage on Initiative rolls. You're an expert in sneaking and hiding, gaining advantage on related checks.

class_features.name: Iron Mind
class_features.description: You have advantage on checks that affect your mind.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: WIS-based. Spells: Light (LV1+, DC11), Invisibility (LV3+, DC12), Alter Self (LV5+, DC12), Arcane Eye (LV7+, DC14), Wrath (LV9+, DC14).

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats.
+1 to spellcasting checks.
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.
Choose a talent.

classes.name: Spellsword
classes.description: A mage that incorporates swordplay and magical dance with music.

class_features.name: Bless
class_features.description: You know the Bless spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Performance
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to performance, dancing and singing.

class_features.name: Blade Magic
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know through the blade you hold. You know two tier 1 spells from the wizard spell list.

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats.
+1 to melee or ranged attack rolls.
+1 to Spellsword spellcasting checks.
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know.
Choose a talent.

classes.name: Swashbuckler
classes.description: A lightly armored acrobatic fencer that is an expert in the blade, acrobatics and charm.

class_features.name: Dual-Wielder
class_features.description: Make two attacks on your turn with a rapier and dagger, or two daggers.

class_features.name: Rapier
class_features.description: The Swashbuckler has access to the Rapier (Cost: 8 gp, Type: M, Range: C, Damage: 1d6, Properties: Finesse).

class_features.name: Gentile
class_features.description: Expert at acrobatics, stealth, guile and romance. Advantage on Dexterity and Charisma checks.

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats.
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.
+1 to armor class (reroll if duplicated).
Choose a talent.

classes.name: War Mage
classes.description: A magic-user trained for war on the battlefield that wears armor.
armor: Special — Arcane Armor only (see class feature)

class_features.name: Arcane Armor
class_features.description: Transform leather armor into magical armor only you can wear, granting AC 11 + DEX modifier. You can cast spells while wearing it.

class_features.name: Detect Magic
class_features.description: You know the Detect Magic spell. It doesn't count toward your number of known spells.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast wizard spells you know. You know two tier 1 spells at 1st level.

talents_table.effect: +2 points to distribute to stats.
+1 to melee or ranged attack rolls.
+1 to War Mage spellcasting checks.
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know.
Choose a talent.

classes.name: War Master
classes.description: A master of weapons that can utilize multiple techniques during a battle.

class_features.name: Blacksmith
class_features.description: You can make and repair armor, weapons and metal items. Access to a forge, smithing tools and materials.

class_features.name: Art of War
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to war, historic battles, military organizations and combat tactics.

class_features.name: Maneuvers
class_features.description: Declare one technique per round: Disarm (take weapon), Parry (+1 AC 1 round), Evade (enemy has disadvantage), Precision (+1 to hit), Power (+1 damage), Trip (knock prone), Push (push to near range with shield).

talents_table.effect: You get +1 AC from the armor you wear.
+1 to melee and ranged attack rolls.
+1 to melee and ranged damage rolls.
+2 points to distribute to stats.
Choose a talent.

classes.name: Desert Rider
classes.description: Howling barbarians thundering across the sand on wild horses, elven spies wielding curved blades atop silvery camels, or bandits wrapped in colorful silks racing on sleek, desert stallions.

class_features.name: Charge
class_features.description: 3/day, charge into combat by moving at least near before attacking. Melee attacks deal double damage that round.

class_features.name: Mount
class_features.description: You have a common camel or horse with a reliable or lovely demeanor. It comes when you call and never spooks. While riding, you both get +AC equal to half your level (round down). Mount has additional levels equal to half your level (round down). Freely leap on/off once per round. DC 15 CHA to replace a lost mount, lowering DC each attempt.

talents_table.effect: You can use any rider-bearing creature as your mount
You gain +1 to attacks or damage
+2 to Strength or Dexterity stat, or +1 to melee attacks
Gain an additional use of your Charge talent each day
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Pit Fighter
classes.description: Blood-soaked warriors circling each other in a roaring arena, scarred desert bandits dueling for the right to lead their gang, or brash tavern brawlers who never turn down a challenge.

class_features.name: Flourish
class_features.description: 3/day, regain 1d6 hit points when you hit an enemy with a melee attack.

class_features.name: Implacable
class_features.description: Advantage on Constitution checks to resist injury, poison, or endure extreme environments.

class_features.name: Last Stand
class_features.description: You get up from dying with 1 hit point on a natural d20 roll of 18-20.

class_features.name: Relentless
class_features.description: 3/day, when reduced to 0 HP, make a DC 18 CON check (Implacable applies). On success, go to 1 HP instead.

talents_table.effect: 1/day, ignore all damage and effects from one attack
You gain +1 to melee weapon damage
+2 to Strength or Constitution stat, or +1 to melee attacks
Increase the HP you gain from Flourish by 1d6
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Ras-Godai
classes.description: Black-clad assassins who train from childhood inside a hidden desert monastery. They gain their sorcerous powers from a legendary black lotus flower that was given to them by a demon.

class_features.name: Assassin
class_features.description: Advantage on checks to sneak and hide. Attacks deal double damage against unaware targets.

class_features.name: Smoke Step
class_features.description: 3/day, teleport to a location you can see within near. Does not use your action.

class_features.name: Black Lotus
class_features.description: Roll one talent on the Black Lotus table (d12): 1. Gain two Black Lotus talents (reroll further 1s), 2. 1/day paralyze target LV9 or less for 1d4 rounds on weapon damage, 3. ADV on DEX checks to avoid entrapment/injury, 4. +1 AC when dual-wielding melee weapons, 5. Gain an additional HP die, 6. Triple damage with Assassinate, 7. Enemy morale DC becomes 18, 8. 1/day walk on water 1d4 rounds, 9. 1/day put LV5 or less creature to sleep (DC15 CON), 10. 1/day walk on walls 1d4 rounds, 11. +1 melee weapon damage, 12. 1/day creature can't see/hear you 1d4 rounds (DC15 WIS).

talents_table.effect: You are trained in the use of poisons
Roll an additional talent on the Black Lotus Talents table
+2 to Strength or Dexterity stat, or +1 to melee attacks
Gain an additional use of your Smoke Step talent
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Sea Wolf
classes.description: Seafaring raiders who prowl the isles for plunder in dragon-headed longboats. When the warhorn sounds, they become fierce berserkers and shield maidens who hope to please their gods with a brave death.

class_features.name: Seafarer
class_features.description: Advantage on checks related to navigating and crewing boats.

class_features.name: Old Gods
class_features.description: Choose one after each rest: Odin (regain 1d4 HP per kill), Freya (gain luck token + add 1d6 when using luck tokens), Loki (advantage on lie/sneak/hide checks).

class_features.name: Shield Wall
class_features.description: If you wield a shield, use your action to take a defensive stance. Your AC becomes 20.

talents_table.effect: 1/day, go berserk: immune to damage for 3 rounds
Your attacks deal +1 damage
+2 to Strength or Constitution stat, or +1 to attacks
Duality; choose two different Old Gods effects each day
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Seer
classes.description: Baleful diviners who reek of smoke and blood. They untangle the whispers of the gods by reading the runes, the bones, and the stars. Their knowledge of fate allows them to bend it.

class_features.name: Destined
class_features.description: Whenever you use a luck token, add 1d6 to the roll.

class_features.name: Omen
class_features.description: 3/day, make a DC 9 WIS check. On success, gain a luck token (max one at a time).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast seer spells using Wisdom. DC = 10 + spell tier. Failed check = can't cast that spell until rest. Natural 1 = must complete Seer Penance.

talents_table.effect: Learn an additional seer spell from any tier you can cast
Gain an additional use of your Omen talent each day
+2 to WIS or CHA stat, or +1 to spellcasting checks
Increase the die category of your Destined talent by one
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

seer_penance.sacrifice: Temporarily give up 1d4 HP (stay at 1 HP minimum); returns in a week
Temporarily lower WIS stat by 2 points; returns in two weeks
Sacrifice 1 point of Charisma; it never returns
Ritualistically sink a burning longboat into the sea

classes.name: Knight of St. Ydris
classes.description: Cursed knights who walk the path of St. Ydris the Unholy, the Possessed. They embrace the darkness in order to fight it, cleansing evil with a flurry of steel and forbidden sorcery.

class_features.name: Demonic Possession
class_features.description: 3/day, gain +1 bonus to damage rolls for 3 rounds. Add half your level to the damage bonus (round down).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast witch spells using Charisma. DC = 10 + spell tier. Failed check = can't cast until rest. Natural 1 = roll on Diabolical Mishap table.

talents_table.effect: Your Demonic Possession bonus increases by 1 point
+1 to melee or ranged attacks
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution stat
+2 to Charisma stat or +1 to witch spellcasting checks
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Warlock
classes.description: Howling warriors with sharpened teeth, wild-eyed doomspeakers preaching of The Dissolution, and cloaked lore-hunters bearing the hidden Mark of Shune.

fixed: Choice of Celestial, Diabolic, Draconic, Primordial, or Sylvan

class_features.name: Patron
class_features.description: Choose a patron to serve. Your patron is the source of your supernatural gifts. It can grant or withhold gifts at any time.

class_features.name: Patron Boon
class_features.description: At 1st level, gain a random Patron Boon from your patron. You may roll on your Patron Boon table instead of the Warlock Talents table when you gain a talent.

Almazzat.effect: 1/day, gain advantage on melee attacks for 3 rounds
Learn to wield 1 melee weapon or get +1 to melee attacks
+2 to Strength or Constitution stat or +1 to melee damage
Gain advantage on initiative rolls (reroll if duplicate)
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

Kytheros.effect: 1/day, force the GM to reroll a single roll
Gain +1 to your AC through supernatural foresight
+2 to Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom stat
3/day, add your WIS bonus to any roll (reroll if duplicate)
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

Shune the Vile.effect: 1/day, read the mind of a creature you touch for 3 rounds
Learn a wizard spell, tier = half your level. Cast it with INT
+1 XP whenever you learn a valuable or significant secret
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

Mugdulblub.effect: 1/day, turn into a crawling puddle of slime for 3 rounds
Maximize 2 hit point die rolls (prior or future)
Become immune to 1: acid, cold, poison (reroll if no options)
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

Titania.effect: 1/day, hypnotize a LV 5 or less creature for 3 rounds
Learn to wield a longbow or gain +1 to ranged attacks
Hostile spells that target you are always hard to cast
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

The Willowman.effect: 1/day, teleport to a far location you see as your move
1/day, force a close being to check morale, even if immune
Choose one option or 2 points to distribute to stats

talents_table.effect: Roll a Patron Boon from any patron; an unexplained gift
Add +1 point to two stats (they must be different)
+1 to melee or ranged attacks
Roll two Patron Boons and choose one to keep
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Witch
classes.description: Cackling crones stooped over cauldrons, chanting shamans smeared in blood and clay, and outcast maidens with milky eyes that see portents and secrets.

class_features.name: Familiar
class_features.description: You have a small animal (raven, rat, frog, etc.) that serves you loyally and can speak Common. It can be the source of spells you cast. If it dies, restore it by permanently sacrificing 1d4 hit points.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast witch spells using Charisma. Know three tier 1 spells at level 1. DC = 10 + spell tier. Failed check = can't cast until rest. Natural 1 = roll on Diabolical Mishap table.

talents_table.effect: 1/day, teleport to your familiar's location as a move
+2 to Charisma stat or +1 to witch spellcasting checks
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Learn an additional witch spell of any tier you can cast
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Beastmaster
classes.description: Limbs and mouths contort and crack as bones and jaws rearrange themselves. A shapeshifting warrior who bonds with animals and transforms into beasts.

class_features.name: Beast Attack
class_features.description: Choose one animal type to use for all melee attacks (see Class Options). If your talents allow for multiple animals, you may choose which animal to use with every individual attack.

class_features.name: Beast Hide
class_features.description: Your skin is covered with a protective hide. If your CON modifier is positive, also add it to your AC.

class_features.name: Beast Shape
class_features.description: Once per day, you and your possessions may transform into the natural form of your chosen beast for 3 rounds, taking on the animal's statistics, attacks, and abilities. You still need light to see. If you take damage while in this form, do not transfer that damage to your own HP when you return to your humanoid form. If you reach 0 HP in your animal form, you transform back at 0 HP, starting your death timer as normal.

talents_table.effect: You may use Beast Shape 1 additional time per day
Increase die category to chosen Beast Attack damage
+2 to Strength or Constitution stat or +1 to unarmored AC
Make an animal magic item (see p 135, 136, 144 of Un. Sel.)
Select and add a new beast attack to your arsenal

classes.name: Fiend
classes.description: Disciplined inferno keepers, molten architects, or diabolical pyromancers who harness the energy of arcane flame from the molten heart of the earth, the nightmarish abyss, or the searing forges of fallen stars.

class_features.name: Wicked Tongue
class_features.description: Your oratory prowess deceives others, granting you advantage on any negotiation, intimidation, persuasion, or misdirection checks.

class_features.name: Firebond Weapon
class_features.description: Pulling from the eternal flames of the abyss, you can ignite your melee or ranged weapon as part of making an attack. It deals an additional d4 of fire damage on hit. The weapon's flame is not enough to pierce the darkness.

class_features.name: Pyromancy
class_features.description: You wield the relentless energy of the eternal flame in powerful and unique ways. Only one pyromancy talent can be active at a time. Upon gaining level 2, roll one talent from the Pyromancy table, with additional rolls at every even level. You are immune to your own pyromancy.

talents_table.effect: 1/day, know the desires or fears of a creature in near range
+1 to melee or ranged attacks
+2 to Strength, Dexterity or Constitution stat
Roll an additional talent on the Pyromancy Talents table
Choose one option or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Grave Warden
classes.description: Reverent undertakers, eager bone-setters, or cold-hearted executioners who wield the power of the undead to do their bidding.

class_features.name: Necrotic Reap
class_features.description: You can cast touch spells through a scythe. Add +1 spellcasting bonus to touch spells when doing so.

class_features.name: Claim Undead
class_features.description: 1/day you can seize control of any number of undead. Their total LV cannot exceed your own. Undead make a DC 12 CHA check to resist.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast grave warden spells you know. You may choose three tier 1 spells of your choice from the grave warden spell list. Add your constitution modifier when casting grave warden spells. The DC is 10 + the spell's tier. If you fail a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete a rest. If you roll a natural 1 on a spellcasting check, you must also roll on the corresponding Necrotic Mishap table for the spell's tier.

talents_table.effect: Claim Undead gains one DC step for undead resistance (max DC 18)
+2 to constitution stat or +1 to grave warden spellcasting checks
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
Increase the Necrotic Reap bonus by an additional +2
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Ovate
classes.description: Custodians of nature's balance, wielders of flora's might, or omen-reading diviners who guide the primal forces to shape our destiny.

fixed: Two animal species of player's choice

class_features.name: Animal Companion
class_features.description: To start, you verbally control one 0-level non-insect animal companion such as a fox, owl, or iguana.

class_features.name: Calm Animals
class_features.description: 1/day, your soothing aura pacifies natural animals within near. Their total LV cannot exceed 2X your own. Giant animals attempt a DC 12 WIS check to resist. A calmed animal will regard you as a friend, but not a companion.

class_features.name: Train Animal
class_features.description: You can train a calm or captive animal to become a new Animal Companion. You can only have one animal companion at a time, and its LV cannot exceed yours. For every 2 LV of the animal, training takes 1 day. You must know its language to understand it.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast ovate spells you know. You may choose two tier 1 spells from the ovate spell list. Add your wisdom modifier when casting ovate spells. The DC is 10 + the spell's tier. If you fail a spellcasting check, you can't cast that spell again until you complete a rest. If you roll a 1, you can't cast that spell again until you attend a ritualistic purging or ceremony.

talents_table.effect: The number of animal companions you can have increases by one
Gain advantage on casting one spell you know
+2 to wisdom or +1 to ovate spellcasting checks
You can speak to an additional species of animal
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Plague Doctor
classes.description: Shadow-veiled alchemical apothecaries, compassionate herbalist healers, or beak-masked disease cultists who can perform surgeries and harness the power of science.

class_features.name: Mask Infusion
class_features.description: Inhale one pre-made herbal elixir from your mask for immediate infusion. Lasts all day, expires on use.

class_features.name: Mesmerize Insect
class_features.description: 1/day, you bewitch an insect to automatically deliver an injure elixir to a target within near range via sting or bite.

class_features.name: Elixirs
class_features.description: You can craft elixirs by making an INT check. Apply the modifier for the chosen delivery method (see Delivery Method table) to this check. This does not cost an action. If you fail, you can't make that elixir again until you rest. Except for mask infusions, elixirs expire in 5 rounds. Critical success increases DC or die category by one or doubles duration. Critical fails self-inflict harmful elixirs.

elixirs.name: Stenchwort
elixirs.effect: Immune to smells and cures paralysis.

elixirs.name: Panacea
elixirs.effect: Ends one poison, disease, or plague.

elixirs.name: Inoculant
elixirs.effect: Receive ADV on a check vs. a specific hazard type you name. Examples: Fire, acid, necrosis.

elixirs.name: Toxin
elixirs.effect: DC 12 CON check or paralyzed for 1d4 rounds.

elixirs.name: Acid
elixirs.effect: Target takes d6 damage equal to half your level rounded down.

elixirs.name: Plague
elixirs.effect: DC 12 CON check or 1d6 permanent damage. Check daily to fully recover or take another 1d6.

elixirs.name: Pheromone
elixirs.effect: DC 12 WIS check or living creatures are calmed and consider you a reluctant friend for 5 rounds or until they are attacked by you or an ally.

elixirs.name: Remedy
elixirs.effect: Heals d6 equal to one plus half your level rounded down.

delivery_methods.description: Lasts up to 1 day or until activated.
Quaffed like a potion or otherwise eaten.
Skin must be punctured after elixir is applied to a weapon like a stiletto, rapier, or dart.
Skin must simply be touched by the elixir.

talents_table.effect: Mesmerize one additional insect per day (reroll duplicates)
Add an extra die rolled on an elixir you choose
+2 to intelligence or dexterity stat, or +1 to elixir checks
You gain ADV on elixir checks for an elixir you choose
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats

classes.name: Shaman
classes.description: Indispensable medicine men and oracles who serve as healers, guardians of ancient wisdom, and conduits between the tangible and ethereal realms.

class_features.name: Healing Circle
class_features.description: 1/day you can perform a 10-minute drumming and chanting meditation. All participants are healed for 1d4 HP if the performance is not interrupted. A spellcaster or herbalist can recover a lost spell or elixir instead. Random encounter chance is increased.

class_features.name: Chanting
class_features.description: You can perform shamanic chants you know using your drum and voice. You know two tier 1 chants of your choice from the shamanic chants list. Add your Wisdom modifier to perform shamanic chants. The DC is 9 + the chant's tier. If you fail a chanting check, you can't perform that chant again until you complete a rest. All chants are like focus spells; while maintaining a chant you can move but take no action.

talents_table.effect: Gain an additional use of your Healing Circle talent each day
+2 to wisdom stat or +1 to shamanic chanting checks
Gain advantage on performing one chant you know
Learn one additional shamanic chant of any tier you know
Choose a talent or +2 points to distribute to stats
